title: Command Cockpit Stage Lens Compression
summary: Slimmed the mounted stage lens into a thinner Command Cockpit status strip so the playable lane surface begins sooner.
proof: Added tested Command Cockpit CSS that tightens the active-lane stage lens grid, height, margin, padding, and signal cells.
Hid the extra stage-lens meta line only in the Cockpit stage while preserving view and signal orientation.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the stage-lens compression unlock.
